rows.label: tlk47300163_03_msg0001
rows.name:
You're about to do something big,
aren't you? Your eyes give it away.

rows.label: tlk47300163_03_msg0002
rows.name:
For you, I recommend Stamin-Nass,
which grows in my fields too.

rows.label: tlk47300163_03_msg0003
rows.name:
Eating Nass when it's time to act...
Pretty refined, don't you think?
